title: Lonnaw
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Lonnaw.jpg]] |name=Lonnaw |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Lonnaw system/Legends|Lonnaw system]] *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Droma sector/Legends|Droma sector]] |system=[[Lonnaw system/Legends|Lonnaw system]][[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |coordinates=K-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *[[Imperial Remnant]] }} {{Quote|I understand you'll be making a short tour through Republic space before you enter the Unknown Regions.''"
"''A sort of shakedown cruise, yes. ''[…]'' From here we go to Lonnaw in Droma sector.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Pakmillu]], at Yaga Minor|}} '''Lonnaw''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located on the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]]. It served as the first scheduled stop on the shakedown cruise of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|exploratory]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. [[12 ABY/Legends|Thirty-nine]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, Lonnaw was temporarily [[Battle of Lonnaw|captured]] from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by the [[Imperial Remnant]]. ==Description== Lonnaw was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]{{CSWECite|II|261|Lonnaw}} located in the [[Lonnaw system/Legends|Lonnaw system]], within the [[Droma sector/Legends|Droma sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] regions. The [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] linked the planet to the [[Orinda system/Legends|Orinda]] and [[Obredaan system/Legends|Obredaan systems]], with at least five more [[Star system/Legends|systems]] being located between Lonnaw and the world of [[Orinda/Legends|Orinda]]. ==History== [[File:Orinda-systems.png|thumb|left|200px|Lonnaw was captured by the Imperial Remnant in 12 ABY.]] In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']], which depicts the launch of the [[Outbound Flight Project]], to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] on a [[Outbound Flight Project|mission]] to [[Scout/Legends|explore]] and [[Colonist/Legends|colonize]] the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], launched from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Yaga Minor system/Legends|Yaga Minor system]] planet [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]]. As the first scheduled stop in a three-[[Standard week/Legends|week]]-long shakedown cruise, the ''Outbound Flight'' visited Lonnaw for a routine [[Astrogation/Legends|navigational]] check, leaving afterward for the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']] [[Argai Minor system/Legends|Argai Minor system]]. Lonnaw fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. It was [[Battle of Lonnaw|seized]] by the [[Imperial Remnant]] that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], however, as part of a [[Orinda campaign|series]] of conquests of Republic systems. Lonnaw was the most [[Core Worlds/Legends|Coreward]] of the Remnant's captured holdings from Orinda. The [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] entrenched themselves at Lonnaw but eventually fell back to Orinda after a number of skirmishes against the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|forces]] of the New Republic. ==Behind the scenes== Lonnaw was first mentioned in the [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']], written by [[Timothy Zahn]]. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the planet within grid square K-6. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Lonnaw}} *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Lonnaw }} [[Category:Droma sector locations]] [[Category:Imperial Remnant planets]] [[Category:Locations along the Entralla Route]] [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]]
